column28:
Maybe you could let people add each of their each uma winrates. for example, instead of only putting Mayano/Goldship/Mcqueen got 15 wins out of 20, i can also input like Mayano won 5, goldsip won 9, mcqueen won 1. This way you can made a better data that represents which uma is better in CM. We get lots of rare picks with high winrate because those people that do oshi run are most likely had another OP Ace that carried them. Like someone from another server played winning ticket, won 1/20, but because he had a goldship with 85% winrate on round 1, the data for winning ticket would be too high.

Of course this should be optional, since lots of people would be too lazy to put more data. Anyway thanks for the great service you all did. Appreciate all of the efforts to make the community better
